reviews.review_description: I’m really enjoying this app - it’s great to pop in and do a little coloring - the colors are very vibrant with a lot of choices and options.  It really keeps me away from the TV (and the snacks) and makes me feel like I’m accomplishing something.  This is for us folks that like calm and quiet.

***NOTE*** Since I’m the first review I don’t wanna leave anything under 5 stars, but my actual score is 4/5. 


Positives:
Endless pictures to choose from
Ease of repositioning drawing board 
Tools are pretty easy to use and learn

Negatives:
- The crayon and pencil options need to be fine tuned more. Takes too many strokes to reach adequate brightness. The markers work pretty well though. 
- Need more eraser options. Take finger to erase large areas. Also tough to erase minor mistakes. 
- Need an UNDO button. 

This is a lot like PowerWash VR for me… just a really chill and relaxed game, def worth the $10. Please just fine tune the tools and this will be a banger

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review and the feedback.


I will look into the crayons and the pencil and look at tweaking their opacity. I could actually make this an option in the settings menu so people could find what works best for them.


Agreed on the eraser, the default one is "ok" but maybe some sort of whiteboard eraser style as well as a fine tip eraser could work well.... That should be easy enough to implement I think.


Totally hear you on the undo button too, it's actually on the "todo" list but I'm just trying to work out the best way to implement it and perhaps redo as well.


I've updated the trello board with these new suggestions, you can track them here https://trello.com/b/icPQSLeT/features


thanks again for trying the game!

reviews.review_description:
Outside The Lines VR on Meta Quest is a brilliantly relaxing coloring experience brought into virtual reality. The concept is simple—pick an outlined drawing and fill it in—but it works incredibly well in VR
There is a tutorial but as it is so smooth and intuitive, I didn’t need it, letting you colour naturally and precisely without frustration. A massive choice of drawings to pick from or upload your own.  There are crayons, pencils and felt-tips and a full pallet of color, you can even mix and shade colors and tools.
It’s perfect for unwinding—no pressure, no timers, just pure creative relaxation. Whether you want to carefully stay within the lines or go completely off-script, it gives you the freedom to enjoy it your way.
A great app for anyone looking to chill out, get a bit creative, or just lose track of time in a calming VR space. Simple idea, beautifully executed.   It would be amazing if the dev would introduce a zoom option and also hands to hold the coloring tools.  That said still 5 star.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the detailed review and the rating, appreciate you taking the time. A hand tracking mode is on the backlog of things to be implemented so hopefully will be coming soon!

reviews.review_description: This coloring app is so polished. It works perfectly with so many options for coloring, from positioning of the desk (or no desk if desired) to adjustable haptics, colors, coloring utensils, customizing colors and eraser. I love being able to sit on my couch, watch whats going on around me and have what feels like an actual coloring session using mixed reality. There are many coloring pages to choose from and you can remove the design to have a blank page for creating your own art or just playing with colors. This app performs pretty perfectly. I forget that the page, desk, and pens are virtual reality. The potential for additional features is promising (although there are plenty already) and although there are many images available, it would be cool if there was a way to create and/or import your own coloring pages, perhaps from your own collection or via ai. Great addition to anyone’s App Library.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind review. To actually answer some of your points too:

* You can actually import your own artwork, but it's a bit of an advanced feature, but if you want to try it you can follow the instructions here: https://www.outsidethelinesvr.com/#faq-custom-artwork

* If you have great ideas for additional features then check out this faq: https://www.outsidethelinesvr.com/#faq-great-idea

Thanks again for enjoying the experience :)

reviews.review_description:
This is a simple easy one for all ages.
Lots of drawings to choose for you to colour in, in the relaxing surroundings.

You have pencils, crayons, felts, chisel tip felt… all in different sizes and colours for you to choose from… plus the trusty eraser to rub away them mistakes shh!

It’s a nice price for a relaxing experience.

I’d like to see some animation added to the outside background… also maybe some birds, wind ect..
Maybe a YouTube video player near you, so that you can colour whilst watching or listening to some of your fave vids/music.

And maybe a sit down option.. as at the moment, you have to adjust height of the table

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for taking time to play the game and write a review.

reviews.review_description: If you have younger children that play VR, this is just a brilliant vibrant colouring experience for them to get involved in, so many different pictures to paint, I do think it needs some background music to add to the experience to provide that calming factor, but a great start & very relaxing.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review and the great rating. I'm glad you're finding it a great way to get younger children into colouring (without all of the clutter!) :)

reviews.review_description:
Outside the Lines does a great job in delivering the satisfacition of a coloring book in VR. The dev did an awesome job in creating an experience which feels cozy and made it fun to use the tools. I really had fun in getting creative and watching my progress. 

The games comes with quite a broad variety of motives to cover and cool tools - for example having multiple pens with different sizes and colors ready at once. 

The workroom looks cool. Overall for that price a very worthwhile and rewarding experience.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review, really glad you're enjoying it. I hope it brings you as many hours of joy coloring as it brings me :)

reviews.review_description:
This is an awesome escape from reality, relax, and draw-on experience. I love the home setting, its calm enough that you can really focus on the drawing and aisle is positioned perfectly from tbe get go. I love that we're able to also manipulate it a few different ways for different play styles.
Recommendations are for an 'undo' button, currently using just two buttons on the controller means there's a lot of extra feature options! Undo would be amazing. Also, a lot of artwork options seems AI Generated, there's a lot of great options. If you could add a prompt to speak/generate your own that would bring it to the next level, pre-empt the agent to be black/white overlay and apply it respectively. I love that we can disable guides as well. 
Overall, its an awesome game! Looks like dev is continuing to work on it, and can't wait to jump back in! 👌😁

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for taking the time to leave a review, and such a nice review too!

An "undo/redo" feature is in the works, just need to make sure it works well and feels right. You can follow along with the planned features at the Trello board -> https://trello.com/b/icPQSLeT/features

A lot of the library is ai assisted (https://www.outsidethelinesvr.com/#faq-ai-generated) but it's not just as simple as giving it a prompt and having it generate artwork, it gets it wrong way more than it gets it right just doing that so it needs a human eye to keep everything in check.

The artwork library is growing though with more and more artwork from real artists! There's already a folder by artist Bellamere, and in the next update a new artist's work will be coming too! The plan is to grow the art by bringing real artists work and the ai assisted art was just to make sure there was content for the base game.

Thanks again for the review :)

reviews.review_description: As soon as i saw the trailer, I knew it was an instabuy. I downloaded the trial, finally got to try it today and halfway through, closed the trial and bought the app. If you are into casual games to unwind and chill, this is the ticket. Great work, devs!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind review. Glad you liked the trial, hopefully it was long enough to give the experience to decide whether it's worth purchasing.

reviews.review_description: It's a good game lots of pictures to color to choose from simple to understand on getting started easy to go out side the lines but even easier to erase the slips there is lots of colors to chose from it a little difficult to grab the crayons but its easy to put down and grab differently love the game would recommend great game devs

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, hope you get many hours worth of enjoyment from it!

reviews.review_description: If you like colouring, it does what it says on the tin
